description_long: This pair of low-top sneakers features a predominantly white synthetic leather upper with black heel tabs and white laces. The outer sides of both shoes are decorated with colorful cartoon graphics, including a black cat and a yellow bird, with a small red heart between them, reminiscent of classic animated characters. The shoes have a thick, white rubber sole that provides a platform-like appearance, and the toe box is rounded and smooth. The tongue displays a rectangular label with text, adding a branded touch to the design. The overall construction appears sturdy and clean, with no visible signs of wear or dirt. The interior is lined in a light color, and the shoes are designed for casual, urban wear.
description: White low-top sneakers with cartoon graphics, black heel tabs, and thick white soles. Features clean lines, white laces, and a playful, urban aesthetic.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded toe boxes, white laces, and the clean, symmetrical design of the shoes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the cartoon graphics of a black cat and yellow bird, as well as the black heel tab and thick white sole.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the black heel tabs and the open, lightly colored interior lining of the shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the same cartoon graphics and overall design features.
attribute_logo: rectangular label with text on the tongue, color appears black on white
